graduate.name: Morgan and Madison Cook
graduate.headline: Bethel Park High School Class of 2026
graduate.about: Morgan will be attending Ohio Northern University in the Fall and playing lacrosse and studying Sports Medicine.
graduate.about2: Madison will be attending Slippery Rock University and studying secondary education.
